creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Hey Jason,

There aren't any specific features we need and I'm not running these pipelines myself, so a cautious approach sounds good.  We have the new version installed on our cluster, so if I hear any feedback from our group members I'll pass it along.

In the future I'll submit pull requests to your -wip repositories.  Let's see if I annoy you enough with PRs, then you can consider giving me commit access.

Joseph
